_doc: Kill-switch + safety config for Tradovate auto-trader. Edit to control the bot from anywhere.

active_contract._note: Update contract_id + contract_name before rollover. Next: MNQU6 (Sep), MNQZ6 (Dec)

_safety_notes: enabled=false 脙聝脗聝脙聜脗聝脙聝脗聜脙聜脗聝脙聝脗聝脙聜脗聜脙聝脗聜脙聜脗聝脙聝脗聝脙聜脗聝脙聝脗聜脙聜脗聜脙聝脗聝脙聜脗聜脙聝脗聜脙聜脗垄脙聝脗聝脙聜脗聝脙聝脗聜脙聜脗聝脙聝脗聝脙聜脗聜脙聝脗聜脙聜脗聜脙聝脗聝脙聜脗聝脙聝脗聜脙聜脗聜脙聝脗聝脙聜脗聜脙聝脗聜脙聜脗聠脙聝脗聝脙聜脗聝脙聝脗聜脙聜脗聝脙聝脗聝脙聜脗聜脙聝脗聜脙聜脗聜脙聝脗聝脙聜脗聝脙聝脗聜脙聜脗聜脙聝脗聝脙聜脗聜脙聝脗聜脙聜脗聮 bot ignores ALL signals (still logs to journal)
max_qty caps quantity per order regardless of what Pine sends
daily_cap is read from journal; bot stops after N orders/day
symbol_whitelist: only tickers whose root matches will execute
active_contract: maps ticker_root to a specific Tradovate contract_id
skip_on_danger: if alert has danger=1, skip execution (still logs)
market_hours_only: skip outside CME GLOBEX RTH (will be CME-aware later)
default_tp_ticks / default_sl_ticks 芒聙聰 TP/SL ticks for OSO brackets when Pine doesn't send explicit sl/tp (read by Zapier Step 4 + dashboard P&L calc)
_strategy_started_at_note: ISO timestamp 芒聙聰 analytics filters trades older than this. Null = show all. Edit via 冒聼聯聢 Analytics page's '脳聰脳陋脳聴脳聹 脳聬脳隆脳聵脳篓脳聵脳聮脳聶脳聰 脳聻脳聰脳聶脳聲脳聺' button.
